name_cn:
Dior Groove🔆 25 Handbag 'Large White'
This Dior Groove 25 handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from white calfskin, it features a quilted oversized woven pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm is embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, making it unique. The zippered lock opens with the included key charm. The spacious compartment features an insert pocket and a zip pocket for daily essentials. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily looks.
Zipper closure with a lock engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo
Leather key charm embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with vintage gold-finish metal stars, comes with a key
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Internal insert pocket
Model: 1365
Size: 25 x 19 x 16 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 small bag, 1 wallet, 1 phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses and lipstick
